hostTooltip: IP address the Hue bridge will bind to
portTooltip: HTTP port for the Hue API (typically 80 or 8080)
httpsPortTooltip: HTTPS port (optional, leave empty to disable)
discoveryHostTooltip: Host announced via SSDP (default: same as Host)
discoveryPortTooltip: Port announced via SSDP (default: same as Port)
macTooltip: MAC address for bridge identification (format: AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF)
udnTooltip: Unique Device Name - auto-generated if empty
deviceConfigHelp: Configure virtual Hue lights by selecting ioBroker devices. Use 'Detect' for automatic state detection or configure manually.
sourceObjectTooltip: Select the ioBroker device or channel to use as light source
stateMappingHelp: Map ioBroker states to Hue light properties. Use 'Detect' to auto-fill or select manually.
stateCtTooltip: Number state for color temperature (mireds 153-500 or Kelvin)
stateXyTooltip: CIE xy color coordinates (optional, array or comma-separated)
